meta.title: Salt-dependent haemagglutinating measles virus in S.S.P.E -- Gould et al. 33 (1): 139 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: Two strains fo S.S.P.E. virus show both haemagglutinin and salt- dependent haemagglutinin. These properties are associated with distinct plaque forms within each strain. The existence of salt-dependent strains in wild-type measles virus suggests that they should be found in the early isolates of all strains of S.S.P.E.
